title: Glucose Monitors and Antidiabetic Agents for Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
summary: This LCD covers glucose monitoring and certain antidiabetic medications including SGLT2 inhibitors for beneficiaries with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus meeting specified clinical criteria. Coverage requires documented diagnosis of T2DM and failure or contraindication to first-line metformin therapy, or specific cardiovascular/renal risk factors.
_fixture_note: Illustrative LCD based on CMS database structure. Verify against live CMS API.
